title: Silver's Custom Weapon and Armour Pack
description: This pack introduces a full set of custom armour, unique weapons, and a standout shield shaped like a sword (Modern house key shaped) alternate version with no "Keys" version available too.
body:
A lightweight expansion that brings fresh style and utility to your world.

This pack introduces a full set of custom armour, unique weapons, and a standout sword‑shaped shield, perfect for players who want their gear to feel distinct without straying too far from vanilla sensibilities.

Features
Custom Armour Set  
Striking, readable silhouettes designed to feel powerful while still fitting naturally into Minecraft’s aesthetic and making player skins more visible to distinguish friend from foe.

New Weapons  
A selection of handcrafted blades and tools that give your loadout a sharper identity.

Sword‑Shaped Shield  
A hybrid defensive/offensive design that reads as a sword when held.
Includes built‑in dynamic lighting, letting you illuminate caves, bases, and night battles simply by equipping it.

Survival‑Friendly  
All items are balanced for regular gameplay and integrate smoothly into progression.

Two Variants Available
With Keys — Recommended  
Includes the modern key‑inspired swordbreaker design.

No Keys  
The same pack without the key‑inspired weapons, ideal for players who prefer a more traditional or vanilla‑plus look.

Note: The No Keys version does not include dynamic lighting for the shield, as the sword‑shield is not included.
